caption: A group of people are gathered at an event held in front of a large yellow and green backdrop featuring a portrait of a man and text in Tamil, including the phrases "தொட்டதெல்லாம் துலங்கட்டும், புதிய தொழில்கள் துவங்கட்டும்." and "வாங்கு தமிழ் மேக் பாப்போம்!". Several men stand on a raised platform, including one wearing a white traditional veshti and shirt and another in a white shirt and khaki trousers. A man in a dark suit stands slightly behind them, observing. In the foreground, a seated audience consisting of several men in white shirts and others in casual attire, some wearing face masks, watch the proceedings. Tables with water bottles and papers are positioned before the audience. Across the sequence, the individuals remain largely in the same positions, with subtle shifts in posture and gaze, while the overall scene and setting remain constant.
